name: eslint-config-valantic
description: The default ESLint config of valantic.

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:ts && npm run test:vue
scripts.test:raw: npm run test:js:raw && npm run test:ts:raw && npm run test:vue:raw
scripts.test:js: eslint tests/test-javascript.js --config index.js --format json | node tests/verify-test-result.ts 45 1 js-snapshot
scripts.test:ts: eslint tests/test-typescript.ts --config typescript.js --format json | node tests/verify-test-result.ts 12 0 ts-snapshot
scripts.test:vue: eslint tests/test-vue.vue --config vue.js --format json | node tests/verify-test-result.ts 5 1 vue-snapshot

author: valantic
